angle: Transform your old tablet into a smart home controller
hook: Got an old tablet? Let’s turn it into a smart home hub!
script: Got an old tablet? Let’s turn it into a smart home hub! First, download a smart home app that supports your devices. Next, connect to Wi-Fi and lock it in place near your entryway. Lastly, customize the interface to control lights, thermostats, and more. It’s an easy way to keep your home smart without spending a dime on new gadgets. Follow for more!
overlays: Place it in a good spot
caption_body: Why buy a new hub? Reuse your old tablet! What will you control first? 🤔
full_caption: Why buy a new hub? Reuse your old tablet! What will you control first? 🤔 #tech #gadgetreview #smarthome #tabletsetup #techhacks
